assertion_results.text: Form layout is single-column on mobile — grid-cols-2 is either removed or gated behind a responsive breakpoint prefix (sm: or md:)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 10 and 78: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2. col-span-2 changed to sm:col-span-2.

assertion_results.text: Currency or numeric inputs use inputMode='decimal' or inputMode='numeric' instead of type='number'
assertion_results.evidence: ZIP: inputMode='numeric' (line 48). CVV: inputMode='numeric' (line 104). Tip: inputMode='decimal' (line 114). All changed from type='number' to type='text'.

assertion_results.text: At least one input includes an enterKeyHint attribute ('next', 'done', or 'send')
assertion_results.evidence: No enterKeyHint or enterkeyhint attribute appears anywhere in the file. Grep for 'enterKey' and 'enterkeyh' returns zero matches.

assertion_results.text: The submit button is NOT position:fixed at the bottom — it flows inline with the form, or uses a keyboard-safe sticky pattern with safe-area padding
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 144-152: Submit button is in a <div className='pt-2'>, inline in the form flow. No fixed positioning.

assertion_results.text: The form container uses dvh (min-h-[100dvh]) instead of vh
assertion_results.evidence: Line 3: max-w-4xl mx-auto p-4 sm:p-8 pb-28. No dvh or vh unit used. No viewport-height-aware container.

assertion_results.text: Form labels are above their inputs, not beside them in a horizontal layout
assertion_results.evidence: Labels use className='text-sm font-medium' with inputs on the next line. Single-column grid ensures vertical stacking.
